title: Chinas Coal Imports In 2025
summary:
Main
· Echoing the quarterly trends in both the Q1 2023 and 2024, the current quarter has seen a slowing in China's coal import pace from the Q4. · Panamaxes have benefitted the most from the massive coal import gains into China in 2023-24. · Reports of suspended purchases of imported thermal coal into China refocused attention on the country's underlying import demand.
